product.name: ArAstar
descriptions: ArAstar, 100% Polyester taffeta fabric for garment lining.
It can be used as a lining inside of the shoes.
ArAstar is the most economical woven fabric on the market as textile material.
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp > 500N ; Weft > 400N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 20N ; Weft > 15N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

stage1.noMatchReason: ArAstar is a generic 100% polyester lining fabric for garments and shoe linings, with no explicit sector application (military, medical, sport, transport, etc.) stated in the product data.

evidence: It can be used as a lining inside of the shoes.
primary.rationale: The product is explicitly described as usable for shoe lining, which is the only concrete named application; other uses (general garment lining) are not tied to a specific sector in the taxonomy.

secondary.rationale: No independent secondary sector is explicitly stated; the fabric's other use is generic garment lining without a named industry.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: No explicit statement of industrial or workwear-specific use; only generic garment lining is mentioned.
No mention of outdoor, rainwear, or leisure garment application.

modelOutput.reviewReason: Product is a generic polyester lining fabric with only a brief mention of shoe lining use; the dominant intended application is ambiguous and weakly supported by the available evidence.
